title: You Belong to Me
writer: Elizabeth Alexander, Grover Jones, William Slavens McNutt
actors: Lee Tracy, Helen Mack, Helen Morgan
plot: When recently widowed vaudeville performer Florette Faxon marries acrobat Hap Stanley, her son Jimmy takes an instant dislike to his new stepfather, preferring the company of happy-go-lucky vaudeville comic Bud Hannigan.
